name: labeling
description: Authenticated write-path for the in-app labeling page (L4). Reads the registered judges for an experiment and each dimension's label progress toward the readiness floor, and records a HUMAN label on a trace by reusing ail.judges.labeling.record_label — an mlflow.log_feedback named for the judge (the name-match MemAlign aligns by). Records the authenticated labeler; the client identity is never trusted. Fail-closed — never a fabricated 'labeled'.
